title: festuca pseudosulcata subsp. litvinovii
intro: Festuca pseudosulcata subsp. litvinovii, also known as Litvinov's fescue, is a type of grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. Festuca pseudosulcata subsp. litvinovii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
